en_title: Upcoming Nintendo Switch 2 Games: Release Dates for 2026 and Beyond
cn_title: 《任天堂》《Nintendo Switch 2》2026年及以后游戏阵容一览
subtitle: 新机护航阵容来了
opus_summary: 任天堂新主机Nintendo Switch 2即将到来，游戏阵容已初具规模。从《星际火狐64》重制版到《斯普拉遁》新作，再到《宝可梦》第十世代，第一方与第三方作品齐头并进。此外还有《High on Life 2》《007》等大作，以及多款独立游戏和经典重制，满足各类玩家需求。本文汇总了2026年已确认发售的Switch 2游戏，包括独占作品、第三方移植以及兼容原Switch游戏的向后兼容优势。

paragraphs.en: We now have our hands on the Nintendo Switch 2 , a new console from one of the biggest names in gaming. Alas, a new console is only as valuable as the library of games you can build on it.
paragraphs.cn: 我们现在已经拿到了Nintendo Switch 2，这是游戏界巨头之一推出的新主机。不过，一台新主机的价值终究取决于你能在上面玩到的游戏阵容。

paragraphs.en: Thankfully, Nintendo hasn't been shy about planned releases over the next year, which include a mix of Switch 2 exclusives, third-party releases, and the benefit of backward compatibility with any games still launching on the original Switch. Without further ado, here are all of the new Switch 2 games we can look forward to in 2026.
paragraphs.cn: 好在任天堂并未对接下来一年的发售计划遮遮掩掩，其中包括Switch 2独占作品、第三方游戏，以及兼容原版Switch新作的向下兼容优势。闲话少说，以下是2026年值得期待的Switch 2新游戏。

paragraphs.en: This open world survival game gives you a spread of floating islands to farm and build on while harnessing energy from the wind and sun. How do you travel across said islands, you may ask? An airship, of course. Solarpunk will release on Switch 2 as well as PS5, Xbox, and PC, and will support multiplayer modes at launch.
paragraphs.cn: 这款开放世界生存游戏让你在漂浮的群岛上耕种、建造，同时利用风能和太阳能。你可能会问，如何在岛屿间穿梭？当然是飞艇了。《Solarpunk》将登陆Switch 2、PS5、Xbox和PC，发售即支持多人模式。

paragraphs.en: Despite what you may have assumed, this is not just your standard "themed" version of Monopoly. Announced in the lead-up to Star Wars Day 2026 , Monopoly: Star Wars Heroes vs. Villains lets you pick from an impressive slate of, well, heroes and villains, each with their own unique abilities. The somewhat standard Monopoly element is the pursuit of claiming territory, which, in this case, includes some familiar locations from across the galaxy.
paragraphs.cn: 别误会，这可不是普通的「主题版」大富翁。在2026年星球大战日前夕公布的《大富翁：星球大战英雄vs反派》让你从众多英雄和反派中挑选角色，每个角色都有独特能力。大富翁的核心玩法——占领地盘——依然保留，只不过这次的地盘变成了银河系中那些熟悉的地点。

paragraphs.en: to a T is coming to a Switch 2 just over a year after its initial launch on PC and other consoles. The narrative-driven game puts you in control of Teen, a young teenager you can customize in character creation, who is always making a T-pose.
paragraphs.cn: 《to a T》在PC和其他主机首发一年多后登陆Switch 2。这款叙事驱动游戏让你控制一名名为Teen的青少年（可在角色创建中自定义），他总是不由自主地摆出T字姿势。

paragraphs.en: Instead of trying to explain this one myself, I’m simply going to borrow from my colleague Rebekah Valentine’s interview with the developer: “ Denshattack! Is Tony Hawk With Japanese Trains, for Train-Lovers, by Train-Lovers .” Yes, it’s awesome.
paragraphs.cn: 与其我自己来解释，不如直接借用同事Rebekah Valentine对开发者的采访：「《Denshattack!》就是日本火车版的《托尼霍克》，由火车爱好者为火车爱好者打造。」没错，这游戏太棒了。

paragraphs.en: The Adventures of Elliot is a new HD-2D RPG from the creators of Octopath Traveler and Bravely Default . While exploring ruins near his hometown, Elliot discovers an artifact that lets him traverse space and time. From there, you must travel across four ages, each with unique citizens and scenery, to try and save your home.
paragraphs.cn: 《The Adventures of Elliot》是《歧路旅人》和《勇气默示录》制作团队打造的全新HD-2D RPG。主角Elliot在探索家乡附近的遗迹时，发现了一件能穿越时空的神器。随后，你必须穿越四个时代，每个时代都有独特的居民和风景，努力拯救你的家园。

paragraphs.en: Announced in a shadow-dropped Nintendo Direct, a remake of Star Fox 64 is coming to Switch 2 this summer. The game features full overhauls of the graphics and character designs while keeping the OG level designs and, of course, the Team Star Fox banter. If you happen to have a supported Switch 2 camera, you can also live out your V-Tubing dreams with AR character avatars .
paragraphs.cn: 在突袭发布的任天堂直面会上，《星际火狐64》重制版宣布将于今年夏季登陆Switch 2。游戏全面翻新了画面和角色设计，同时保留了原版关卡设计和星际火狐小队的插科打诨。如果你有兼容的Switch 2摄像头，还能用AR角色化身实现你的V-Tuber梦想。

paragraphs.en: The High on Life sequel we said offers a “completely foul world of offensive creatures and irreverent antiheroes” in our review is getting a Switch 2 edition this July. While there’s a big emphasis on decision-making , the game’s main focus continues to be on comedy and some fast-paced shooter action. There’s also lots of skateboarding.
paragraphs.cn: 《High on Life》续作——我们在评测中称其呈现了「一个充满冒犯性生物和无礼反英雄的肮脏世界」——将于今年7月推出Switch 2版。虽然游戏强调决策，但核心依然是喜剧和快节奏射击动作，还有大量滑板元素。

paragraphs.en: Rhythm Heaven is getting its first new entry in over a decade , and of course composer Tsunku has returned for the ride. Like previous iterations, the game will feature a collection of mini-games that ultimately task you with following the rhythm.
paragraphs.cn: 《节奏天国》将迎来十多年来的首款新作，作曲家淳君自然回归。与前作一样，游戏包含一系列小游戏，最终考验你跟随节奏的能力。

paragraphs.en: Granblue Fantasy: Relink was originally released all the way back in 2024, with IGN’s own review highlighting “fun action combat and an interesting cast of characters.” This summer, the game will be coming to Switch 2 in a special edition that includes all expansions and bonus content.
paragraphs.cn: 《碧蓝幻想：Relink》早在2024年就已发售，IGN评测称赞其「爽快的动作战斗和有趣的角色阵容」。今年夏季，游戏将以包含所有扩展和追加内容的特别版登陆Switch 2。

paragraphs.en: The latest Digimon Story game was a highlight for RPG releases in 2025, and it's getting its own Switch 2 edition this summer. In his review of the full game on PC , writer George Yang highlights the storytelling as well as “nuances in type matchups and the tinkering you can do with your party’s evolutions and movesets.”
paragraphs.cn: 最新《数码宝贝物语》游戏是2025年RPG作品中的亮点，今年夏季将推出Switch 2版。在PC版评测中，作者George Yang称赞了其故事叙述，以及「属性相克的微妙之处和队伍进化与技能搭配的调整空间」。

paragraphs.en: The next Splatoon game officially has a release date . The Switch 2-exclusive release will be single-player focused, letting you customize and control your own Mechanic, while supporting up to four players in co-op. It also looks to have a particularly big map that you progressively unlock throughout the game.
paragraphs.cn: 下一款《斯普拉遁》游戏正式公布了发售日期。这款Switch 2独占作品将以单人模式为主，让你自定义并操控自己的「技师」，同时支持最多四人合作。游戏似乎还拥有一张特别大的地图，随着流程逐步解锁。

paragraphs.en: From Masato Kato, the writer behind Chrono Trigger, comes Another Eden Begins, a completely fresh RPG that takes you on a journey across the past, present, and future. Recruit companions from a roster of 18 characters to help you take down the Beast King and find your sister. This one’s got a whopping 10 endings on the menu, though I’m sure some of those are reserved for New Game+.
paragraphs.cn: 由《时空之轮》编剧加藤正人打造的《Another Eden Begins》是一款全新的RPG，带你穿越过去、现在和未来。从18名角色中招募同伴，帮助你击败兽王并找到妹妹。这款游戏拥有多达10种结局，不过其中一些显然是为多周目准备的。

paragraphs.en: The latest LEGO game finally has a Switch 2 release date. LEGO Batman: Legacy of the Dark Knight is truly next level . It blends and parodies classic Batman moments from across all iterations of the caped crusader while also offering a pretty massive plastic version of Arkham to play around in. Even the combat is pretty elaborate, with inspiration from the Arkham games courtesy of development support from Rocksteady Studios.
paragraphs.cn: 最新乐高游戏终于确定了Switch 2发售日期。《乐高蝙蝠侠：黑暗骑士的遗产》真正达到了新高度。它融合并恶搞了蝙蝠侠各个版本的经典桥段，同时提供了一个相当庞大的塑料版阿卡姆供你探索。战斗系统也相当精细，得益于Rocksteady Studios的开发支持，从《阿卡姆》系列中汲取了灵感。

paragraphs.en: Yet another massive multi-platform release, IO Interactive's take on James Bond is launching on Switch 2 several months after its initial release on PC, PS5, and Xbox in late May. The game lets you play out Bond's initial recruitment and rise in the MI6 ranks, featuring Patrick Gibson as the titular spy and .
paragraphs.cn: 又一款大型多平台作品——IO Interactive打造的詹姆斯·邦德游戏将于5月底在PC、PS5和Xbox首发，几个月后登陆Switch 2。游戏让你体验邦德最初被招募并在军情六处晋升的过程，由Patrick Gibson饰演这位传奇特工。

paragraphs.en: This third-person action shooter puts you in control of 17-year-old Reona Minazuki, a professional ‘Diver’ that explores deadly ‘Anomaly Zones’ for the government while searching for her lost friend. The Steam listing offers the rather interesting description that the game is “steeped in the atmosphere of liminal spaces and Showa-era retro aesthetics.”
paragraphs.cn: 这款第三人称动作射击游戏让你操控17岁的水无月玲央奈，她是一名职业「潜水员」，为政府探索致命的「异常区域」，同时寻找失踪的朋友。Steam页面上有一段相当有趣的描述：游戏「沉浸在阈限空间氛围和昭和复古美学之中」。

paragraphs.en: There are plenty more Nintendo Switch and Switch 2 games in development that don’t have a solid release date yet. Here are some more games we know are on the way, including the highly-anticipated 10th generation of Pokémon :
paragraphs.cn: 还有大量Nintendo Switch和Switch 2游戏正在开发中，尚未确定发售日期。以下是我们已知的更多即将推出的游戏，包括备受期待的《宝可梦》第十世代：

paragraphs.en: Blythe (she/her) is an Audience Development Coordinator at IGN who spends way too much time in character customization screens and tracking down collectibles.
paragraphs.cn: Blythe（她/她）是IGN的受众发展协调员，她在角色自定义界面和收集品追踪上花费了太多时间。
